meta.note: DRAFT horticultural estimates. Verify spacing/temp/pH against Perenual and carbon factors against Poore & Nemecek 2018 / Our World in Data before pitching numbers.
meta.carbonRule: Food plants only: seasonal_savings = yieldKgPerSeason × co2eSavedPerKg. Ornamentals/pollinators use yield=0 and co2e=0; impact case is biodiversity, not invented CO2e.
meta.nativeRegionNote: Draft biogeography for suggestion ranking. Prefer plants whose continents/suitedClimates overlap the gardener's location; North American natives score highest for Toronto demos.
meta.openplantdbNote: Care fields cross-checked against OpenPlantDB (CC0), https://github.com/cwfrazier1/openplantdb
meta.carbonSource: co2eSavedPerKg = OWID/Poore & Nemecek 2018 category value (https://ourworldindata.org/grapher/ghg-per-kg-poore), assuming home-grown ~0 kgCO2e/kg. See owid_carbon_report.json for mapping.

harvest.weatherNotes: Needs warm soil; cool nights delay ripening; frost kills fruit set.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Long warm stretch required; cold spells push harvest later.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Prefers cool weather; heat makes it bolt (harvest earlier or bitter).
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Steady moisture speeds roots; heat + dry soil slows and toughens roots.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Fast once warm; cold nights stall flowers and fruit.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Loves heat and water; cool/cloudy stretches delay fruit.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Heat lover; nights under ~15°C slow coloring and size.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Sweeter after light frost; extreme heat slows tender growth.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Bolts quickly in heat — spring/fall crops finish faster and sweeter.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Very fast in cool moist soil; heat → pithy roots (pick ASAP).
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Plant after frost; cool soil delays germination and pods.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Heads best in cool weather; heat can cause early bolting.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Steady cool growth; heat may loosen heads.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Even moisture = smoother roots; hot dry spells slow sizing.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Frost kills tops; cool soil is fine, extreme heat reduces tuber set.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Long daylength + mild weather; drought slows bulb swell.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Fall-planted; overwinters; harvest next summer when tops brown.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Loves cool spring; heat stops flowering and pod fill.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Needs sustained heat; cool spells delay fruit dramatically.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Warmth + water drive ears; cool cloudy weeks stretch days-to-harvest.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.

harvest.weatherNotes: Cut-and-come-again; heat slows tender leaves, frost can damage tips.
harvest.note: daysToHarvest is a baseline in good conditions; live weather can push toward min/max.
